title: Example Graduate Software Engineer
education_level: Bachelor's (can apply in your final year)
summary: Build and ship product features across a Python and React stack.
day_to_day: Pair with a senior engineer, pick up a ticket, write and review code, and deploy small changes to production most days.
career_advancement: Grow from Graduate to Software Engineer II within ~18 months with a dedicated mentor and clear progression framework.
description: A full-time graduate role for a recent Comp sci graduate. Ship real features from your first fortnight with regular pairing and mentorship. We offer employer-sponsored visas and the skilled work supports a 189, 190 or 186 pathway.

title: Example Mid Mechatronic Engineer
day_to_day: Pair with a senior engineer, pick up a ticket, write and review code, and deploy small changes to production most days.
career_advancement: Grow from Mid to Engineer III within ~18 months with a dedicated mentor and clear progression framework.
description: A casual engineer role. Ship real features from your first fortnight with regular pairing and mentorship. We offer employer-sponsored visas and the skilled work supports a 189, 190 or 186 pathway.
